---
title: "Microbial Community Analysis with SingleM"
author: "Your Name"
output: rmdformats::readthedown
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

# Set chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

```


# Loading Required Libraries 
```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

# Load the packages we need
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(vegan)
library(zCompositions)
library(ggforce)
library(microeco)
library(file2meco)
library(cowplot)

```

## Load and combine SingleM output files
```{r}

# Folder containing SingleM profile files
data_dir <- "singlem_output"

# Find all SingleM profile files
file_list <- list.files(
  path = data_dir,
  pattern = "_profile\\.tsv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

# Extract sample IDs from each filename
sample_names <- basename(file_list) %>%
  stringr::str_extract("[0-9]{2}_[0-9]{2}_[A-Z]{3}")

# Read each file and rename the coverage column immediately
data_list <- purrr::map2(
  file_list,
  sample_names,
  ~ read.delim(.x, header = TRUE) %>%
      dplyr::select(taxonomy, coverage) %>%
      dplyr::rename(!!.y := coverage)
)

# Join all samples into one table
joined_data <- purrr::reduce(data_list, dplyr::full_join, by = "taxonomy")

# Replace missing abundance values with 0
joined_data[is.na(joined_data)] <- 0

```

## Split taxonomy into levels
```{r}

# Taxonomy levels to create
taxonomy_levels <- c("Root", "Domain", "Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")

# Fix any missing or empty column names
names(joined_data)[is.na(names(joined_data)) | names(joined_data) == ""] <- "unknown"

# Split the taxonomy string into separate columns
joined_data <- joined_data %>%
  separate(
    taxonomy,
    into = taxonomy_levels,
    sep = "; ",
    fill = "right",
    remove = TRUE
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Phylum  = replace_na(Phylum,  "p__unclassified"),
    Class   = replace_na(Class,   "c__unclassified"),
    Order   = replace_na(Order,   "o__unclassified"),
    Family  = replace_na(Family,  "f__unclassified"),
    Genus   = replace_na(Genus,   "g__unclassified"),
    Species = replace_na(Species, "s__unclassified")
  )

###
save(joined_data, file = "Singlem_df.RData")

# Uncomment next line if needed to reload in singlem RDdata file
# load("Singlem_df.RData")


```


## Create Phyloseq Object
```{r}

# Separate abundance and taxonomy tables
taxonomy_cols <- c("Root", "Domain", "Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")

abundance_data <- joined_data[, !(names(joined_data) %in% taxonomy_cols)]
taxonomy_data  <- joined_data[, taxonomy_cols]

# Read metadata table
samdf <- read.delim("MB_sediment_metadata.txt", sep = "\t", header = TRUE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, colClasses = "character")


# Match metadata to the sample order in abundance_data
rownames(samdf) <- colnames(abundance_data)

ps <- phyloseq(
  otu_table(as.matrix(abundance_data), taxa_are_rows = TRUE),
  tax_table(as.matrix(taxonomy_data)),
  sample_data(samdf)
)

```


## Create Microtable object (microeco)
```{r}

# Convert phyloseq object to microeco format
meco_dataset <- phyloseq2meco(ps)

save(samdf, ps, meco_dataset, file = "MB_microeco.RData")

# Uncomment next line if needed to reload in singlem RDdata file
# load("MB_microeco.RData")

```

### Taxanomic Analysis

## Compositional Bar Chart
```{r,warning = FALSE,message=FALSE,fig.width= 15, fig.height=8}

# By Order
t2 <- trans_abund$new(dataset = meco_dataset, taxrank = "Class", ntaxa = 40)
t2$data_abund$Site <- factor(t2$data_abund$Site, levels = c("Mission Point","Fanuel St Park", "Paradise Point", "Fiesta Sunset Beach", "De Anza Cove", "South Shores", "Leisure Lagoon", "Tecolote Creek"))
t2$data_abund$Month <- factor(t2$data_abund$Month, levels = c("October", "November", "December", "January"))

# By Order
t3 <- trans_abund$new(dataset = meco_dataset, taxrank = "Order", ntaxa = 50)
t3$data_abund$Site <- factor(t3$data_abund$Site, levels = c("Mission Point","Fanuel St Park", "Paradise Point", "Fiesta Sunset Beach", "De Anza Cove", "South Shores", "Leisure Lagoon", "Tecolote Creek"))
t3$data_abund$Month <- factor(t3$data_abund$Month, levels = c("October", "November", "December", "January"))

# Plot by Site
g2s <- t2$plot_bar(bar_full = TRUE, others_color = "grey70", facet = c("Site"), legend_text_italic = FALSE, clustering = FALSE, x_axis_name = NULL, color_values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(10, "Paired")) + theme_classic() + theme(text = element_text(size = 14), axis.text = element_text(size = 14), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)) + guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 2,title = "Class"))
g2s

g3s <- t3$plot_bar(bar_full = TRUE, others_color = "grey70", facet = c("Site"), legend_text_italic = FALSE, clustering = FALSE, x_axis_name = NULL, color_values = RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(10, "Paired")) + theme_classic() + theme(text = element_text(size = 14), axis.text = element_text(size = 14), axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)) + guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 2,title = "Order"))
g3s



plot_grid(g2s, g3s, ncol = 1, align = 'v', labels = "AUTO")
ggsave("plots/MB_taxa_composition_barplot_Order_SiteandMonth.pdf", width = 18, height = 18, limitsize = FALSE)

```

## Species: Alpha Diversity
```{r, fig.width= 10, fig.height=10}

ps@sam_data$Month <- factor(ps@sam_data$Month, levels = c("October", "November", "December", "January"))
ps@sam_data$Site <- factor(ps@sam_data$Site, levels = c("Mission Point","Fanuel St Park", "Paradise Point", "Fiesta Sunset Beach", "De Anza Cove", "South Shores", "Leisure Lagoon", "Tecolote Creek"))


pmonth <- plot_richness(ps, x = "Month", measures = c("Shannon", "InvSimpson"))
pmonth$layers <- list()
pmonth <- pmonth +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = Month, y = value), outlier.shape = NA, fill = "white", color = "black") +
  geom_jitter(aes(x = Month, y = value, color = Site), width = 0.02, alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "H") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3, alpha = 1))) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
pmonth

psite <- plot_richness(ps, x = "Site", measures = c("Shannon", "InvSimpson"))
psite$layers <- list()
psite <- psite +
  geom_boxplot(aes(x = Site, y = value), outlier.shape = NA, fill = "white", color = "black") +
  geom_jitter(aes(x = Site, y = value, color = Month), width = 0.02, alpha = 0.7, size = 2) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "H") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3, alpha = 1))) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
psite

plot_grid(pmonth, psite, ncol = 1, align = 'v', labels = "AUTO")
ggsave("plots/MB_taxa_alpha_SiteandMonth.pdf", width = 10, height = 10, limitsize = FALSE)


```


## Beta diversity Preprocessing - Species
```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

otu <- as(otu_table(ps), "matrix")

# phyloseq says taxa are rows, so transpose to samples x taxa
if (taxa_are_rows(ps)) {
  otu <- t(otu)
}

## Filter sparse taxa before CLR

# remove taxa absent everywhere
otu <- otu[, colSums(otu > 0, na.rm = TRUE) > 0, drop = FALSE]

# optional prevalence filter
otu <- otu[, colSums(otu > 0, na.rm = TRUE) >= 3, drop = FALSE]

##Replace zeros, then CLR by sample 
otu_z <- cmultRepl(
  otu,
  method = "GBM",
  output = "p-counts"
)

clr_mat <- t(apply(otu_z, 1, function(x) log(x) - mean(log(x))))

## Aitchison distance for downstream beta-diversity stats
aitch_dist <- dist(clr_mat, method = "euclidean")

## Run PCA
pca <- prcomp(clr_mat, center = FALSE, scale. = FALSE)

## Percent variance explained
var_explained <- pca$sdev^2 / sum(pca$sdev^2)
pc1 <- round(var_explained[1] * 100, 1)
pc2 <- round(var_explained[2] * 100, 1)

ord_scores <- as.data.frame(pca$x[, 1:2])
colnames(ord_scores) <- c("Axis1", "Axis2")
ord_scores$Sample <- rownames(ord_scores)

## Add metadata
samdf <- data.frame(sample_data(ps))
samdf$Sample <- rownames(samdf)

ord_scores <- merge(
  ord_scores,
  samdf[, c("Sample", "Month", "Site")],
  by = "Sample"
)


```



## Plot Beta
```{r, fig.width= 8, fig.height=8}

ord_scores$Site <- factor(ord_scores$Site, levels = c("Mission Point", "Fanuel St Park", "Paradise Point", "Fiesta Sunset Beach", "De Anza Cove", "South Shores", "Leisure Lagoon", "Tecolote Creek"))

beta_plot_site <- ggplot(data = ord_scores) +
  ggtitle("Beta-diversity by Site") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  geom_mark_ellipse(
    aes(x = Axis1, y = Axis2, fill = Site, color = Site),
    expand = unit(0.5, "mm")
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(x = Axis1, y = Axis2, shape = Month), size = 2) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 15, 16, 17)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("PC1 (", pc1, "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", pc2, "%)"),
    fill = "Site",
    shape = "Month",
    color = "Site"
  )

beta_plot_site

ggsave("plots/MB_taxa_beta_bySite.pdf", plot = beta_plot_site, width = 8, height = 6, limitsize = FALSE)


beta_plot_month <- ggplot(data = ord_scores) +
  ggtitle("Beta-diversity by Month") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  geom_mark_ellipse(
    aes(x = Axis1, y = Axis2, fill = Month, color = Month),
    expand = unit(0.5, "mm")
  ) +
  geom_point(aes(x = Axis1, y = Axis2, shape = Site), size = 2) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7)) +
  labs(
    x = paste0("PC1 (", pc1, "%)"),
    y = paste0("PC2 (", pc2, "%)"),
    fill = "Month",
    shape = "Site",
    color = "Month"
  )


beta_plot_month

ggsave("plots/MB_taxa_beta_byMonth.pdf", plot = beta_plot_month, width = 8, height = 6, limitsize = FALSE)


```


## Beta Stats (Anosim + PERMANOVA + Betadisper)
```{r}

# Run stats on beta div
perm_site  <- adonis2(aitch_dist ~ Site, data = samdf)
perm_site
perm_month <- adonis2(aitch_dist ~ Month, data = samdf)
perm_month

bd_site <- betadisper(aitch_dist, samdf$Site)
bd_site_anova <- anova(bd_site)
bd_site_anova

bd_month <- betadisper(aitch_dist, samdf$Month)
bd_month_anova <- anova(bd_month)
bd_month_anova


```
